title: Prijedor, Republika Srpska — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Prijedor, Republika Srpska: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Prijedor is a city in Republika Srpska with a population of 89,000. A city in northwestern Bosnia known for its mining industry, the Kozara National Park, and the historic Kozara mountain region.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
